title: dactylorchis longifolia
intro: Dactylorchis longifolia, also known as Spiranthes spiralis, is a type of orchid native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dactylorchis longifolia include its potential to treat conditions such as respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems. This plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
